allies.rationale_text: Prioritization helps trade-offs turn constrained choice into explicit ranking instead of rhetorical balance.
Opportunity-cost sharpens trade-offs by making the hidden cost of saying yes visible.
allies.source_quote: Best when decision quality depends on naming the hidden cost of saying yes

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps trade-offs reveal the interrelationships and feedback loops that make one compromise carry costs elsewhere.
allies.source_quote: This framework enables the visualization of interrelationships and feedback loops, revealing the causal links that necessitate trade-offs.

antagonists.rationale_text: Anchoring undermines trade-offs by over-weighting the first frame or metric and obscuring better reallocations.
antagonists.source_quote: This cognitive bias causes over-focus on a single piece of information, preventing objective analysis of trade-offs.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Trade-offs conflicts with status-quo-bias when hidden opportunity costs are ignored to preserve defaults.
structured_tensions.source_quote: trade-offs vs status-quo-bias: trade-offs conflicts with status-quo-bias (status quo bias) when hidden opportunity costs are ignored to preserve defaults.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Trade-offs conflicts with commitment-bias when legacy priorities block reallocation after new evidence.
structured_tensions.source_quote: trade-offs vs commitment-bias: trade-offs conflicts with commitment-bias (commitment bias) when legacy priorities block reallocation after new evidence.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on allocation allies and explicit conflicts with default-preserving and legacy-priority distortions, so the file preserves that surface directly.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor relation sprawl beyond the named prioritization, hidden-cost, and anti-default conflict surface.
open_questions: Availability-style distortions remain source-real antagonists, but anchoring was the cleaner bounded conflict outside the explicit tension block.
